---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, improvement, or enhancement for the website
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

<!--
  Got an idea? We'd love to hear it.
  Before submitting, check the open issues and PRD (PRD.md) to make sure it hasn't already been proposed.
  The more context you give, the easier it is for the team to evaluate and prioritise.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. What should exist that doesn't today? -->

## Problem it solves

<!--
  What pain point or gap does this address?
  Example: "As an attendee, I can't easily add a session to my calendar — I have to manually copy the date and time."

  If this is tied to a user type, use this format:
  "As a [attendee / sponsor / volunteer / contributor], I want to [do something] so that [outcome]."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
  How do you think this should work?
  Be as specific as you can — describe the behaviour, not just the outcome.
  If you have design ideas or references, share them here.
-->

## Which page(s) or area would this affect?

- [ ] `/` — Landing page
- [ ] `/about` — About page
- [ ] `/schedule` — Schedule page
- [ ] `/sponsorship` — Sponsorship page
- [ ] `/past-summits` — Past Summits page
- [ ] `/faqs` — FAQs page
- [ ] `/code-of-conduct` — Code of Conduct
- [ ] `/privacy-policy` — Privacy Policy
- [ ] Global (Navbar, Footer, design system)
- [ ] Developer experience (build, tooling, docs)
- [ ] New page / route — describe below

## What type of change is this?

- [ ] New UI feature or component
- [ ] Content update or addition (speakers, schedule, FAQs, etc.)
- [ ] Design / visual improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Developer experience / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other — describe below

## Alternatives considered

<!--
  Have you thought about other ways to solve this?
  Briefly describe any alternatives and why you prefer the proposed solution.
  If none, write "N/A".
-->

## Is this on the roadmap?

<!--
  Check PRD.md Section 13 (Future Roadmap) to see if this is already planned.
  If it is, link to the relevant item.
-->

- [ ] Yes — it's listed in the roadmap
- [ ] No — this is a new suggestion
- [ ] Not sure

## Mockups / references

<!--
  Wireframes, sketches, screenshots from other sites, or Figma links are all welcome.
  Drag and drop images directly into this text box.
  If none, delete this section.
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else the team should know — related issues, technical constraints, urgency, etc. -->
